cover_letter: Jimmy Rhoades Ensemble Health Partners Cover Letter.pdf
notes: Imported from Swooped.ai on 2026-02-25. Orchestration Works division — new 50-person R&D team in Austin. Pod leader role (CTO called it 'most important role in engineering'). Focus area: A/R follow-up automation. Reports to Matthew Grose, VP of Software Engineering. ~4 teams, ~25 engineers. Acquired Mendel (AI startup, San Jose) summer 2025. EIQ is their patented in-house platform. Revenue model: percentage of customer revenue.

requirements_matched: 4+ years leading managers or multi-team engineering organizations
Proven ability to set engineering strategy and guide architectural direction
Demonstrated success developing leaders and building high-performing engineering teams
Excellent communication skills — translating technical concepts to diverse audiences
Experience driving modernization, platform evolution, and continuous improvement
Exposure to AI-enabled development tools and ML-driven insights
Cloud platforms Azure — Azure-first at Perceptive and Red Spot, Azure requirements at ilumed
JavaScript/TypeScript, .NET Core — Perceptive and Red Spot were .NET shops on Azure

interviews.interviewer: Matthew Grose, VP of Software Engineering
Jesse Estum (Distinguished Engineer / VP of Software Engineering)
interviews.focus: System design (URL shortener), AI philosophy, healthcare interoperability
interviews.outcome: Strong pass — Jesse explicitly said expectations 'more than met'. Dragon Sky listed but not present in transcript. Bethany to follow up with next steps.
Solid pass — executive alignment check. Arathi sold the vision, warm close. Expect offer discussion or final step within the week.
